languages.title: Basa
languages.subtitle: Pilih basa sing digunakake ing saindhenging app.
languages.noResults: Ora ana basa sing cocog karo panelusuran sampeyan.

phone.label: Nomer telpon
phone.searchCountry: Telusuri negara, kode, utawa awalan telpon
phone.noCountries: Ora ana negara sing cocog karo panelusuran sampeyan.
phone.invalid: Ketik nomer telpon sing bener kanggo negara sing dipilih.

auth.onboardingTagline: Sawijining kanca safety pribadi kanggo wektu antarane "Aku ora apa-apa" lan "Aku butuh pitulung."
auth.createSubtitle: Pilih cara mlebu kanggo nglindhungi grafik safety sampeyan.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Kita ora bisa ngrampungake mlebu. Priksa sambungan sampeyan lan coba maneh.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Migunakake sesi pangembangan lokal. Native Google Sign-In dianggo ing pembangunan pembangunan.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Gathukake saiki utawa terusake lan tambahake mengko.
auth.northStarBody: Ing VL01 sing bisa dipakai bisa micu aliran safety nganggo tunyuk lan gerakan penet dawa.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Rekan keamanan sing lembut ing peta lan ing telpon.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear bisa mbantu mode ngarep, mode wali, mode darurat, telpon alesan, lan dhukungan swara.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Digunakake kanggo peta, zona bebaya, tekane kanthi aman, lan konteks SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving nyuwun panggonan supaya para wali bisa ngerti ngendi perlu bantuan. Sampeyan bisa ngganti iki mengko ing Setelan.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Kabar ndhukung check-in lan acara darurat.
permissions.notificationsBody: Kita mung nggunakake kabar kanggo pituduh safety, nganyari darurat, lan pangeling sing sampeyan aktifake.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nggunakake lokasi sampeyan kanggo peta safety, zona bebaya, nuduhake cepet, lan SOS konteks. Sampeyan bisa ngganti iki mengko ing Setelan.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ngirim pangeling mlebu, nganyari darurat, lan pituduh safety sing sampeyan aktifake. Kita ora nggunakake kabar kanggo iklan.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nggunakake mikropon mung nalika sampeyan miwiti AI telpon kanca utawa keamanan.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving nggunakake Bluetooth kanggo masangake karo NorthStar perhiasan, maca status sambungan, lan micu aliran safety saka wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving nyedhiyakake aliran iki saka Setelan lan dasbor.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pilih swara kanca sing paling aman dirungokake.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ngawasi sepi kanggo safety saben dina.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Tuduhake konteks karo wong sing dipercaya.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Lima tunyuk bisa munggah menyang SOS lan tandha wali.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Gawe alasan sing apik kanggo ninggalake kahanan sing ora nyenengake.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Miwiti telpon kanca wektu nyata yen sampeyan butuh dhukungan.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Coba aliran safety ing demo tekanan rendah.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Simpen perhiasan ing cedhak nalika mindhai.
jewelry.noDevices: Durung ana piranti NorthStar sing cedhak.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth mindhai ora bisa diwiwiti. Coba maneh.
jewelry.scanFailed: Kita ora bisa nemokake perhiasan sing cedhak. Priksa Bluetooth, terus NorthStar cedhak, lan coba maneh.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth mindhai ora bisa diwiwiti. Priksa Bluetooth akses lan coba maneh.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Akses piranti ing cedhak mati. Idini akses Bluetooth ing Setelan, banjur coba maneh.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar suwe banget kanggo nyambung. Cedhak lan coba maneh.
jewelry.connectFailed: Kita ora bisa nyambung menyang NorthStar. Priksa manawa wis diisi daya lan cedhak, banjur coba maneh.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Tansah NorthStar diisi daya lan cedhak karo telpon iki, banjur pindai maneh.

home.subtitle: Dasbor pendamping keamanan
home.readyBody: Swara, peta, perhiasan, lan wali mung siji tutul.

map.title: Peta safety
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go pratinjau; Mapbox nerjemahake ing mbangun pembangunan.
map.updateFailed: Kita ora bisa nganyari lokasi sampeyan. Coba maneh.
map.notRequested: Akses lokasi ora dijaluk. Sampeyan bisa ngaktifake mengko saka Setelan.
map.permissionOff: Akses lokasi mati. Aktifake ing Setelan kanggo pusatake peta safety ing sampeyan.
map.timeout: Lokasi sampeyan luwih suwe tinimbang sing dikarepake. Pindhah menyang endi wae kanthi sinyal sing luwih cetha lan coba maneh.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Panggonan sing dipercaya sing sampeyan simpen bakal katon ing kene kanggo akses cepet.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Nyambung kanthi aman menyang kanca swara sampeyan...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Miwiti telpon utawa ketik pesen yen wis siyap.

history.clearMessage: Iki mbusak AI pesen kanca sing disimpen saka piranti iki.
history.title: Riwayat pacelathon
history.subtitle: AI pesen kanca sing disimpen ing piranti iki.
history.emptyMessage: Obrolan AI kanca sampeyan bakal katon ing kene sawise telpon pisanan.
history.loadFailed: Kita ora bisa mbukak riwayat obrolan. Coba maneh.
history.clearFailed: Kita ora bisa mbusak riwayat obrolan. Coba maneh.
history.deleteFailed: Kita ora bisa mbusak obrolan kasebut. Coba maneh.

voices.title: Swara telpon keamananku
voices.subtitle: Pilih swara kanca sing cocog kanggo dirungokake.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Sampel swara iki ora bisa diputer. Coba maneh.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Gunakake tanggapan kanca sing dibundel nalika jaringan utawa Hume kredensial ora kasedhiya.
settings.privacyBody: Ekspor utawa mbusak data lokal sing disimpen ing piranti iki.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ora bisa ngekspor data sampeyan saiki.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Iki mbusak profil, setelan, kontak darurat, riwayat obrolan, pangeling ijin, lan sesi otentikasi lokal saka piranti iki.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ora bisa mbusak data lokal saiki.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Kita ora bisa nyimpen pilihan kasebut. Coba maneh.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sesi sampeyan isih aktif. Coba maneh.

contacts.title: Kontak darurat
contacts.subtitle: Wong sing dipercaya kasedhiya sajrone arus safety.
contacts.name: Jeneng
contacts.empty: Durung ana kontak darurat sing ditambahake.
contacts.emptyMessage: Tambahake wong sing dipercaya supaya dheweke siyap yen ana aliran safety.
contacts.removeMessage: Wong iki ora bakal katon maneh ing aliran darurat sampeyan.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Kita ora bisa nyimpen kontak iki. Priksa rincian lan coba maneh.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Kita ora bisa mbusak kontak iki. Coba maneh.

friends.title: Kanca-kanca
friends.subtitle: Wali, panjalukan, lan grafik darurat.
friends.emptyMessage: Kanca lan wali sing dipercaya bakal katon ing kene yen wis ditambahake.

emergency.title: Darurat SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate mung yen sampeyan butuh dhukungan langsung.
emergency.body: Iki bakal ngabari aliran safety lan nyiapake kontak darurat.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub nuduhake lokasi wis siyap. Sambungake endpoint bareng backend kanggo ngirim link langsung.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tunyuk
capybearTap.subtitle: Tutul kaping pindho NorthStar kanggo nyelehake oranye sing aman.
capybearTap.body: Rute gerakan wis siyap kanggo kabel acara BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Kowe katon offline. Pesen sampeyan bakal dikirim nalika sampeyan nyambungake maneh.
errors.voiceQueued: Pesen disimpen. Bakal dikirim nalika kanca swara nyambung maneh.
errors.voiceConnecting: Nyambung kanthi aman menyang kanca swara sampeyan...
errors.microphone: Akses mikropon dibutuhake kanggo telpon swara. Sampeyan bisa ngaktifake ing Setelan, utawa ketik pesen.
errors.billing: Rekan swara online kanggo sementara ora kasedhiya. Sampeyan bisa nerusake karo kanca offline.
errors.authentication: Rekan swara ora bisa verifikasi sesi iki. Mlebu maneh utawa gunakake kanca offline saiki.
errors.timeout: Rekan swarane suwe banget kanggo nanggapi. Priksa sambungan sampeyan lan coba maneh.
errors.network: Kita ora bisa tekan kanca swara. Priksa sambungan sampeyan, banjur coba maneh utawa terus offline.
errors.genericVoice: Ana sing nyetop telpon swara. Coba maneh, utawa terusake karo kanca offline.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving mbutuhake akses mikropon kanggo safety lan AI telpon kanca.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving nggunakake lokasi sampeyan kanggo peta safety lan fitur safety cedhak.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving nggunakake Bluetooth kanggo nyambungake menyang NorthStar perhiasan safety.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Pilihan mlebu iki ora kasedhiya ing versi iki.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mode demo mung nggunakake data palsu lokal. Layanan sing disambungake ora diautentikasi, lan sesi iki bakal direset nalika aplikasi dimuat maneh.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kode verifikasi ora sah utawa wis kedaluwarsa. Nyuwuna kode anyar banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Kakehan nyoba mlebu. Enteni sedhela, banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Verifikasi mlebu suwe banget. Priksa sambungan sampeyan banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Kita ora bisa nggayuh layanan mlebu. Priksa sambungan sampeyan banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Sesi sampeyan wis kedaluwarsa. Mlebu maneh.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Peta keamanan ora bisa dimuat. Priksa sambungan sampeyan banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Lokasi langsung ora kasedhiya. Nampilake lokasi pungkasan sing disimpen saka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Kita ora bisa nuduhake lokasi sampeyan. Priksa akses lokasi banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Iki lokasi pungkasan sing tak simpen lan direkam ing %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Akses Bluetooth dipateni. Aktifake ing Setelan, banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth dipateni. Uripake, banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Pamasangan Bluetooth ora kasedhiya ing piranti utawa versi iki.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Kita ora bisa nemokake NorthStar. Cedhakake, priksa Bluetooth, banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ora ana piranti NorthStar ing sacedhake sing ditemokake. Cedhakake banjur pindai maneh.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Kita ora bisa nyambung menyang NorthStar. Priksa manawa dayane kebak lan cedhak, banjur coba maneh.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Kita ora bisa nyimpen panggonan iki. Coba maneh.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Panel telpon dibukak; telpon durung dikonfirmasi.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Dibatalake; ora ana telpon sing ditindakake.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ora ana kontak darurat sing kasedhiya; ora ana telpon sing ditindakake.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Panel telpon ora bisa dibukak; ora ana telpon sing ditindakake.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Upaya SOS pungkasan ora bisa dikonfirmasi.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Asisten swara saiki ora kasedhiya. Coba maneh mengko utawa terusake nganggo asisten offline.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
